microsoft_ft: Owned 0→1 product vision, roadmap, and PRDs for Azure's recovery validation platform, scaling a 2-person operation into a platformized system sustaining **45+ annual resilience drills** and driving **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp).

Drove the full product lifecycle from discovery through qualification and sustainment, defining requirements, user stories, and self-service scheduling capabilities that cut operational toil **30%** and transitioned execution to a scalable, repeatable model.

Led matrixed cross-functional execution across engineering, operations, and partners on **14 recovery executions** under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**.

Translated customer needs and threat-evolution data into shippable capability, defining KPIs (recovery rate, mean time to recover, mission availability) and framing technical and commercial trade-offs for engineering and GTM decision-makers.

Scaled team leverage through AI-driven automation, building an internal AI agent and restructuring planning workflows to cut planning-cycle time **39%** and increase drill capacity **21%**, closing the loop between deployed capability and the next release.

pro_painters: Increased job bookings **26%** by optimizing operations and owning the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for **200+ monthly proposals** via a new CRM process, closing the loop between customer needs and delivered work.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost **13%** and boosted conversions **2.7%** by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile against measurable funnel KPIs.
